summary: Comprehensive testing of maritime and air cargo shipping visualization on World Map. Backend: 100% pass (15/15 tests). Frontend: All features working - Stats display, layer tabs, ports toggle, route details panel, risk summary, and legend all functional.
passed_tests: API /api/shipping/routes - Returns 18 routes (9 maritime + 9 air cargo)
API /api/shipping/routes?route_type=maritime - Returns only 9 maritime routes
API /api/shipping/routes?route_type=air - Returns only 9 air cargo routes
API /api/shipping/ports - Returns 27 seaports and 20 airports
API /api/shipping/stats - Returns statistics with risk summary
API Route structure has all required fields (id, name, origin, destination, distance_km, transit_days, volume, disruption_level)
API Routes affected by conflicts (Red Sea, Yemen, Taiwan, etc.) have disruption_level > 0
API Stats: total_maritime_routes=9, total_air_routes=9, total_ports=27, total_airports=20
API Risk summary shows high/medium/low risk routes and critical chokepoints
API Volume at risk calculated correctly (57.6% of total volume)
UI World Map page loads with shipping routes displayed
UI Stats row shows: Maritime Routes (9), Air Routes (9), Major Ports (27), Cargo Airports (20), Routes at Risk (4), Volume at Risk (57.6%)
UI Layer tabs work: All, Maritime, Air Cargo, Conflicts
UI Ports toggle button shows/hides ports on map
UI 18 route items displayed in sidebar
UI Route click opens Route Details panel with origin, destination, distance, transit days, volume
UI Route details show disruption risk % for affected routes (e.g., Asia-Europe via Suez: 40% disruption)
UI Strategic Chokepoints displayed for routes (Suez Canal, Strait of Malacca, Bab el-Mandeb)
UI Risk Summary panel shows High Risk (2), Medium Risk (2), Low Risk (0)
UI Critical Chokepoints displayed in Risk Summary (Suez Canal, Strait of Malacca, South China Sea, Bab el-Mandeb, Strait of Hormuz)
UI Legend displays correctly with Maritime Route, Air Cargo Route, Disrupted Route, Seaport, Airport, Conflict Zone
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shipping visualization on World Map fully tested. Static data: 9 maritime routes + 9 air cargo routes with 27 seaports and 20 airports. Disruption levels calculated dynamically based on conflict data. Key affected routes: Asia-Europe via Suez (40% disruption from Red Sea/Yemen), Persian Gulf-Asia (100% from Iran/Persian Gulf), Intra-Asia (100% from South China Sea/Taiwan), Taipei-Anchorage (50% from Taiwan). All UI interactions working: layer tabs, ports toggle, route details panel.

mocked_apis.note: Shipping data is static/predefined but disruption levels are calculated dynamically based on live conflict data

features_verified.shipping_routes_api: Working - Returns maritime and air cargo routes with disruption analysis
features_verified.shipping_stats_api: Working - Returns statistics and risk summary with critical chokepoints
features_verified.route_filtering: Working - route_type parameter filters routes correctly (all, maritime, air)
features_verified.conflict_integration: Working - Routes affected by conflicts have disruption_level > 0
features_verified.ui_stats_display: Working - Shows Maritime Routes, Air Routes, Major Ports, Cargo Airports, Routes at Risk, Volume at Risk
features_verified.ui_layer_tabs: Working - All, Maritime, Air Cargo, Conflicts tabs filter map display
features_verified.ui_ports_toggle: Working - Button shows/hides ports on map
features_verified.ui_route_details: Working - Click route to see origin, destination, distance, transit, volume, chokepoints, disruption risk
features_verified.ui_risk_summary: Working - Shows high/medium/low risk routes and critical chokepoints
features_verified.ui_legend: Working - Displays all legend items correctly
